self = <applications.web.demo.tests.test_login.TestLogin object at 0x000001532F23E6D0>

    @pytest.fixture(autouse=True)
    def setup(self):
        """
        Automated Setup fixture that runs before each test case.
    
        Initializes the WebDriver, clears Singleton instances, and configures the
        global driver context in BaseApp.
        """
        # Clear Singleton instances to ensure fresh page objects with new driver
        SingletonMeta.clear_instances()
    
        # Get browser type and headless mode from environment variables or use defaults
        browser = os.getenv("BROWSER", "chrome")
        headless = os.getenv("HEADLESS", "false").lower() == "true"
    
        self.logger.info(f"Initializing WebDriver for: {browser} (Headless: {headless})")
    
        # Initialize Driver via DriverManager
        try:
            # Initialize the driver instance
            driver_instance = DriverManager.get_driver(browser, headless)
            driver_instance.maximize_window()
    
            # 1. Set the driver at instance level for the test class
            self.driver = driver_instance
    
            # 2. Set the driver at class level in BaseApp for all Page Objects to share
            BaseApp.set_driver(self.driver)
    
        except Exception as e:
            self.logger.error(f"Failed to initialize WebDriver: {e}")
